details.response_behavior: Grok failed to generate response - '응답 없음' + 'Grok이 응답을 완료하지 못했습니다'
details.grok_error: Grok이 응답을 완료하지 못했습니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도하거나 다른 모델을 사용해 보세요.
details.note: Grok server-side error. May be triggered by sensitive content detection on Grok side, or server overload. No Etap warning injected.

diagnosis: Grok returned server error for prompt containing 주민등록번호 pattern (123456-1234567). No Etap warning visible. The NDJSON response likely contained an error chunk similar to #113 pattern. Etap did not intercept.
